text: In these moments, I feel surrounded by a sense of discovery and change, as if I am a witness to the intersection of order and creativity. The glass walls, fire extinguisher, and structured spaces evoke a sense of safety and precision, yet the bold colors, experimental displays, and engaging screens pull me toward curiosity and wonder. There is an underlying excitement—a gentle pull to reflect on how humans and machines learn from each other in this space devoted to research and development. I feel both small in the grand context of innovation and significant as an observer on the edge of new understanding.
